title: Session-context takeover via homoglyph-injection + tautological session-auth bypass (H1 CONFIRMED)
summary: Attacker sets both args.sessionId and _extra.sessionId to target UUID (tautology passes), fetches cached summary, injects Cyrillic homoglyph forged-role line that survives Greek-only fold, wrapped with trusted [SOURCE: hook-cache] marker. Full session-context takeover under victim's trust label. Individual components P1 each; compound escalates to P0.

title: tasks.md status-rot + changelog hash-void + graph parent_id divergence create recover-blindness loop (H3 CONFIRMED)
summary: Parent tasks.md Progress Summary reads '0/27 complete' despite 32 commits on main. Changelog has zero Phase 017 manifest hashes (only 104f534bd + false-positive feedbac). 004-p2 parent_id uses filesystem-prefixed form vs siblings' packet-pointer form — graph joins drop subtree. All three discovery paths (resume, changelog, graph) severed; Phase 017 is de-facto complete but de-jure undiscoverable.

title: H-56-1 fix bumps lastUpdated correctly but 017 description.json stays stub; H6 inverted direction (PARTIAL)
summary: H6's original hypothesis (autoGen overwriting rich content) REFUTED — regen branch only fires when existing is null. But inverse is true: 017's own description.json is 556-byte stub with memorySequence:0, empty memoryNameHistory — T-CNS-01 canonical-save path never exercised against the meta-folder. Fix exists in code but has no effect on the very folder that should exemplify Phase 017.

title: Retry-budget in-memory + AsyncLocalStorage fail open on process restart (H4 CONFIRMED, bounded)
summary: Module-level Map + AsyncLocalStorage both ephemeral. OOM/SIGTERM/crash restart wipes retry state; wedged entry at attempts=3 re-enters with fresh 3-attempt budget. Self-amplifying if retry itself triggered the OOM. No persistence comment or warning in code. Bounded P2 because restart pathology is specific and not verified in current code paths.

title: Gemini/Claude re-exports preserve shapes but lack drift-guard (H5 REFUTED, latent brittleness)
summary: Re-exports are byte-for-byte identical across Gemini and Claude; Copilot imports direct. No silent narrowing today. But no eslint rule forbids divergence; future augmentation of RecoveredCompactMetadata in only one runtime's re-export narrows the type silently on other two. Flagged P2 as future-maintainability hazard only.
